Guest Lectures & Placement Workshops

Regular industry guest lectures, mock interviews, and placement workshops led by senior ex-bankers prepare every graduate for real branch roles before placement day.

Talk to Placement Team

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets in Maharashtra.
